overview: Demonfly is a Normal-class Demon/Beast monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 20 HP, 17 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Demon Fly Self Destruction at 150% ratio (255 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 800.

phases.name: Combat
phases.description: 2 attacks. Primary: Demon Fly Self Destruction (150%), Demon Fly Self Destruction2 (150%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Aggro Marker
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Aggro Marker icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison Damage
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison Damage icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison Slow
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison Slow icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison Powder
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison Powder icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-2000), Light (-2000), Divine (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1100 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 800, ability check distance 1000
strategies.description: Combat area radius 800. Ability check distance 1000.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1100 units.
